title: Harsh

{{Quote|Excellent! This will prove to be a most rewarding arrangement.|Harsh plots with Seth Kabul|<ref name="3atg" />}}
'''Harsh''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Bosph sector/Legends|Bosph sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He grew up with the dream of commanding a [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] the size of a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] and attended the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] as a young man, graduating with the highest honors after being mentored by a [[Unidentified prominent senator|senator]] who taught him [[Politics/Legends|politics]]. Following his graduation, Harsh joined the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and was eventually made [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Cauldron (Imperial-class)|''Cauldron'']]. At the start of the Galactic Civil War, Harsh led [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to victory in an assault against Rebel forces during a [[Battle of Chabosh (Galactic Civil War)|battle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chabosh]] but was gravely wounded in the process. Against the advice of a [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|medical droid]], Harsh refused a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] replacement [[Limb/Legends|limb]] and instead waited until the wound recovered.

After his victory and recovery, Harsh came to be considered a legend, and [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] personally promoted him to Moff. Given control of the Bosph [[Sector/Legends|sector]], Harsh ruled with an [[Iron/Legends|iron]] fist, [[Bombardment of Bosph/Legends|bombarding]] the planet [[Bosph/Legends|Bosph]] and [[Death/Legends|killing]] many of its [[Bosph (species)|inhabitants]] on Palpatine's orders. Following the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Battle of Endor/Legends|death]], Harsh, who had taken residence on the planet [[Otunia]], conspired with the Human [[Seth Kabul]] to take control of the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company [[Kabul Industries]]. With company head [[Lorn Kabul]], Seth's brother, out of the way, Seth could then partner the company with the Empire. Lorn was successfully killed, but his daughter, [[Arista Kabul]], survived and destroyed the mines used by Kabul Industries, ruining Harsh's plans.

==Biography==
===Early life and career===
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Harsh was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] the child of a minor [[Unidentified minor bureaucrat|bureaucrat]] and, as a young boy, came into possession of a toy [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], which he played with until the toy was destroyed by a larger [[Unidentified bully|bully]]. In retaliation, Harsh took the stone the bully had used to break the Star Destroyer and turned it on its wielder, smashing the other boy's face. As a young man, Harsh attended the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], where he became friends with a prominent [[Unidentified prominent senator|senator]] who mentored him in the art of [[Politics/Legends|politics]]. Harsh eventually graduated with honors and, with the [[Senator/Legends|senator's]] continued mentoring and patronage, was promoted rapidly through the command structure of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], reaching the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and taking command of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Cauldron (Imperial-class)|''Cauldron'']].<ref name="SWG6" />

At the start of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the revolutionary [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Harsh was sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chabosh]], where he led a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in an [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] after the planet's [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Imperial governor (Chabosh)|governor]] was overthrown by the Rebels. Harsh personally led a [[Company/Legends|company]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in the final [[Battle of Chabosh (Galactic Civil War)|assault]] on the Rebels' planetary [[Rebel stronghold (Chabosh)|stronghold]], which was defended by powerful [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]]. During the attack, which was successful, Harsh was severely injured and taken back to the ''Cauldron'', where a [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]] informed him that his [[Limb/Legends|leg]] would have to be replaced by a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] prosthetic. Harsh rejected the idea and held those trying to treat him at bay by threatening other patients with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. Harsh's leg eventually healed on its own, allowing him to walk, and the captain became a legend for his deeds. He quickly earned a number of promotions over many more senior [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]], and one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after his victory on Chabosh, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] personally granted him the title of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]. Harsh received the promotion in a ceremony in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he was given control of the [[Bosph sector/Legends|Bosph sector]]<ref name="SWG6" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref>

===Imperial Moff===
{{Quote|By morning, Kabul estate will be totally occupied and secured.|Harsh informs Seth Kabul of his plans|<ref name="3atg" />}}
[[File:HarshSeth.png|thumb|left|250px|Harsh worked with Seth Kabul to take control of Kabul Industries on Otunia.]]
While Harsh was Moff of the Bosph [[Sector/Legends|sector]], Rebel activity was negligible in the area; however,<ref name="SWG6" /> the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] became aware of the ''[[ela b'Yentarr]]'', a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] faction of the [[Bosph (species)|Bosph]] [[Species/Legends|species]] who were native to the sector.<ref name="AE">{{JournalCite|13|Alien Encounters (article series)}}</ref> On the Emperor's orders, Harsh immediately [[Blockade of Bosph|blockaded]] the Bosph [[Bosph/Legends|homeworld]] before [[Bombardment of Bosph/Legends|bombarding]] it<ref name="SWG6" /> and [[Death/Legends|killing]] huge numbers of its inhabitants.<ref name="AE" /> At some point during or following the year [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">"[[Three Against the Galaxy]]" shows that [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] [[Death/Legends|died]] prior to the comic's events. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] death in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Harsh lived on the world of [[Otunia]] within his sector, and there he survived following the Empire's catastrophic defeat at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="CSWE-Harsh" /> which saw the death of Palpatine.<ref name="CSWE-Endor">{{CSWECite|I|235-236|Endor, Battle of}}</ref>

Sometime after the Emperor's death, [[Lorn Kabul]], the head of the Otunia-based [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company [[Kabul Industries]], was unwilling to enter his company into a partnership with the Empire. Displeased with the decision, Harsh made arrangements with Kabul's brother, [[Seth Kabul|Seth]], to have Lorn killed,<ref name="3atg" /> after which Harsh would gain easier access to the raw material from the mine in exchange for performing political favors for Seth.<ref name="CSWE-Kabul">{{CSWECite|II|190|Kabul, Seth}}</ref> Seth would set [[Explosive charge/Legends|charges]] in a [[THX 8|mining tunnel]], which he would detonate when Lorn and his daughter, [[Arista Kabul]], were visiting for inspection. After significant delays to the plan, Harsh contacted Seth by [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] to demand the scheme move forward, and the event took place the next [[Standard day/Legends|day]]. The charges successfully detonated, and Lorn was killed, allowing Seth to take his place as head of the company and create the partnership Harsh wanted. The Moff then traveled to the [[Kabul Estate]] in person, along with Imperial forces, to occupy and secure it for Seth.<ref name="3atg" />

Arista Kabul, however, had not been killed in the explosion, of which Seth had become aware and sent men out to correct, without informing Harsh. Arista, along with her [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] companion, [[Grissom (Gamorrean)|Grissom]], sneaked into the Kabul Estate shortly after Harsh arrived and visited Seth. Instead of killing Seth, Arista and Grissom had [[Tek]], a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] criminal, destroy the Kabul mines,<ref name="3atg" /> leaving her uncle with nothing,<ref name="CSWE-Kabul" /> following which they fled the planet.<ref name="3atg" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I refuse to accept any more delays!|Harsh grows impatient with Seth Kabul's plan|<ref name="3atg" />}}
As a boy, Harsh dreamed of commanding vessels similar to the Star Destroyer toy he owned. Even from a young age, however, he was combative and violent, attacking another child with a rock for destroying his property. The senator who mentored Harsh taught him a great deal about politics, especially the importance of winning political battles as well as military ones. When wounded at Chabosh, Harsh deemed having a cybernetic limb as being incomplete and thus refused treatment and threatened other patients to ensure he got his way,<ref name="SWG6" /> willing his leg to heal instead.<ref name="CSWE-Harsh" /> When made Moff of the Bosph sector, Harsh did not let himself become complacent and ruled his territory with an [[Iron/Legends|iron]] fist.<ref name="SWG6" />

During his work with Seth Kabul, Harsh became angry at his co-conspirator when there were numerous delays to the plan, although the amount of wealth the plan would earn Harsh pleased him.<ref name="3atg" /> He was a wise and charismatic individual.<ref name="SWG6" /> Harsh had pale skin, [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and was bald when working with Seth Kabul.<ref name="3atg" />

==Skills and abilities==
Harsh was proficient in the use of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]], [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], simple weapons, heavy weapons, and [[Vibro-weapon/Legends|vibroweapons]], as well as all types of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and the [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] of a starship.<ref name="SWG6" />

==Equipment==
Harsh carried a blaster pistol, a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], and a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] with him while on duty.<ref name="SWG6" /> During his [[Time/Legends|time]] working with Seth Kabul on Otunia, he wore a standard [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]].<ref name="3atg" />

==Behind the scenes==
Harsh first appeared in "[[Three Against the Galaxy]]," a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story published in [[Star Wars Tales 3|''Star Wars Tales'' 3]]<ref name="3atg" /> on [[March 29]], [[2000]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53981/star_wars_tales_1999_3|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #3}}</ref> The comic was written by [[Rich Hedden]] and illustrated by [[Rick Leonardi]].<ref name="3atg" />
